app.name: HIBilet Panel
app.description: HIBilet Panel is a platform for managing your sales and transactions
tour.step.dashboard: Dashboard — Your overview of the panel. View today's sales, monthly stats, active sales count, and recent activity at a glance.
tour.step.sales: Sales — Create and manage your sales events. Set up tickets, channels, coupons, guests, and readers for each event.
tour.step.links: Links — Manage your event links. Create shareable links for your sales and track their performance.
tour.step.transactions: Transactions — View and search all completed transactions. Filter by status, sale, or date.
tour.step.reports: Reports — Access detailed reports and analytics for your sales performance.
tour.step.settings: Settings — Configure providers, agreements, mailing, and other account settings.
tour.step.dashboardStats: Quick stats — View today's sales, monthly stats, active sales count, and recent activity at a glance.
tour.step.dashboardSalesChart: Sales chart — View your sales data over time. Select a month and a sale to see the data.
tour.step.dashboardWeeklyEvents: Weekly event sale matrix — View your weekly event sale matrix. Select a week and an event to see the data.
tour.step.dashboardRecentActivity: Recent activity — View your recent activity. Select a transaction to see the data.
tour.step.dashboardRecentActivityViewAll: View all — View all your recent activity.
